$schema_note: Cards for the portfolio build. status: backlog|todo|doing|review|done. Agents pick cards where owner_agent = you, status = todo, and all depends_on are done. Every card also passes code-reviewer -> qa-engineer -> producer before done.

cards.summary: Scaffold Next.js 15 (TS, App Router) + Tailwind + Prettier/ESLint. NOTE: repo root is non-empty — scaffold into a temp dir (npx create-next-app@latest tmp-scaffold --ts --tailwind --app --eslint) then merge files into root, keep our CLAUDE.md/docs/.claude intact.
cards.dod: npm run build + npm run lint green, repo pushed to GitHub

cards.summary: Define routes, folder structure, and content model (MDX in content/projects/ for 4 case studies). Record decisions in docs/.
cards.dod: documented in docs/, approved, no code contradiction

cards.summary: Implement design tokens from docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (teal palette, type, spacing) in Tailwind config + dark-mode setup with toggle.
cards.dod: tokens usable in components, dark mode toggles and persists, no FOUC

cards.summary: Connect GitHub repo to Vercel with the human product owner; deploy skeleton.
cards.dod: live Vercel URL loads the skeleton

cards.summary: Global layout: sticky header (name, nav, GitHub link, theme toggle) + footer.
cards.dod: sticky, responsive, keyboard-navigable, visible focus rings

cards.summary: Home copy from docs/SPEC.md 4.1: hero, trust strip (real clickable claims), skills groups, closing CTA.
cards.dod: facts verifiable, links real, reviewed

cards.summary: Build Home page from approved copy.
cards.dod: matches design system, responsive, dark mode OK

cards.summary: About copy from docs/SPEC.md 4.2: the pivot, how-I-work, timeline (2022 police -> 2024 42 Bangkok -> 2025 AiKlao -> 2026 resigned), certifications with verify links.
cards.dod: honest, verifiable, reviewed

cards.summary: Build About page + vertical timeline component.
cards.dod: responsive, a11y (semantic list, contrast AA)

cards.summary: Resume page: 3 tabs (SE / Backend / QA), DOWNLOAD-FIRST (buttons + thumbnails); inline embed only as desktop enhancement. PDFs from /public/resume/.
cards.dod: PDFs download on mobile + desktop, tabs keyboard-accessible

cards.summary: Contact page: email (verify with product owner first), LinkedIn, GitHub. NO phone number (product-owner decision).
cards.dod: links correct and clickable, mailto works

cards.summary: Projects grid page + project card component (4 cards linking to case-study routes).
cards.dod: 4 cards route correctly, responsive grid

cards.summary: Case study 1 — AiKlao (docs/SPEC.md 5, CS1): single-writer architecture, concurrency-safe SOS deep-dive, 82+138+84 tests, CI gate.
cards.dod: template complete (problem->role->stack->architecture->hard problem->testing->results->links->learned), facts accurate

cards.summary: Case study 2 — Typing Race (CS2): server-authoritative anti-cheat, tick loop, 60 Jest ~99% stmts, Playwright cross-browser E2E, QA Test Strategy doc link.
cards.dod: template complete, facts accurate, live link race.aiklaotrip.com works

cards.summary: Case study 3 — Tiger Kick (CS3): frame as 'I designed a review-gated SDLC and owned the architecture', 116 GUT tests, headless 2-instance net-smoke CI.
cards.dod: template complete, process-first framing, facts accurate

cards.summary: Case study 4 — JPD API (CS4): layered Spring Boot 3, DTO boundary, RBAC, 25 tests (Mockito + MockMvc/H2).
cards.dod: template complete, facts accurate

cards.summary: MDX case-study layout: code blocks, callouts, metric highlights; render all 4 studies.
cards.dod: all 4 render, responsive, dark mode, no CLS

cards.summary: SEO: per-page titles/meta, JSON-LD Person on /, next/og OG image, sitemap.xml + robots.txt.
cards.dod: OG/structured-data validators pass

cards.summary: Full QA pass per docs/QA_CHECKLIST.md: Lighthouse >= 95 all categories, a11y AA (keyboard, contrast, landmarks), link-check, responsive 375/768/1280, dark mode.
cards.dod: checklist all pass or bugs filed as new cards

cards.summary: Custom domain jod.aiklaotrip.com (CNAME with human) + enable Vercel Analytics.
cards.dod: domain live over HTTPS, analytics receiving

cards.summary: OPTIONAL: TH/EN toggle with next-intl; EN is default.
cards.dod: toggle works on every page, no layout break, no SEO regression
